items.title: Delegation is a Love Language
items.author: DevConf
items.content:
<article>Speaker(s): Jeff Ligon
The act of delegating work to someone else can be a gift or a curse. Come learn about how to make it more useful for you and the delegate. We'll walk through examples of doing it well and doing it badly, and examine the consequences of both. You might even leave the talk with an assignment designed to help you! homework is optional of course</article>
